positive: A striking, symmetrical illustration of various fantastical constellations and zodiac symbols, designed as a cohesive pattern or central emblem. The style is clean, minimalist, and highly stylized, evoking the aesthetic of vintage celestial navigation charts mixed with modern geometric linework. Use deep midnight blue, gold, and complementary teal tones. The composition must feature crisp silhouettes of planets, stylized nebulas, and mythical constellations (e.g., the Archer, the Great Bear) arranged in a visually balanced, central grouping. The lines must be sharp and definitive, designed for high-contrast screen printing on dark fabric. Vector art quality, etched detail, cosmic abstract.
negative: blurry, artifact, low quality, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, photorealistic, gradients, muted colors, messy composition
